source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - Structural Damage, Crane/Other Lifting, Main Pass 260 Platform P

actions_taken: Both injured personnel transported to onshore medical facility for evaluation
Both injured personnel released to full work duty same day without restrictions
Verification of all isolation points performed
Equipment installation verification against hazardous area classification drawings
event.summary: On 24 June 2022 at approximately 1147 hours, two Gulf Island Services (GIS) employees were performing construction work on Main Pass 260 Platform P, a right-of-way platform owned by Destin Pipeline Company located 55 miles offshore in 300 feet of water. While installing a skillet to isolate the flare scrubber and flare, workers unbolted a 10-inch flange and determined the skillet did not fit. While waiting for the correct size skillet, a handheld gas detector alarmed, pressure was heard escaping from the flange, and an explosion occurred with a large plume of smoke. Both workers reported burning sensations and smoke inhalation. Both were transported to an onshore medical facility and released the same day without restrictions. No pollution or facility damage occurred. BSEE investigation identified three plausible causes: pyrophoric iron (FeS) combustion when exposed to oxygen through the opened flange (most likely), galvanic cell corrosion from a chain hoist generating electric current, or hydrate release within the piping.
recommendations: BSEE recommends that the Office of Incident Investigations consider a safety alert warning operators about Pyrophoric Iron (FeS) and ways to mitigate risk of these reactions

hazards.name: Pressurized flammable gas in piping system

threats.name: Flange separation without proper isolation and purging
Lack of hazard awareness by workers
Inadequate pre-work hazard analysis and job procedures
Ignition of flammable materials when exposed to oxygen

consequences.name: Personnel thermal burns and smoke inhalation
Potential loss of life or serious injury

controls.name: Handheld gas detector
controls.barrier_role: Detection of gas presence before explosion
controls.lod_basis: Detects hazardous gas condition to alert workers

supporting_text: both IPs' handheld gas detector detected the presence of gas, alarming both of the IPs

controls.name: Purging and flushing of piping prior to work
controls.barrier_role: Remove pyrophoric materials and flammable contents before flange separation
controls.lod_basis: Primary prevention of hazardous material exposure

supporting_text: No purging or flushing of the piping was done prior to the work being done
Personnel failed to identify the possibility of pyrophoric materials within the piping

controls.name: Hazard analysis and written job procedures
controls.barrier_role: Identify and communicate hazards before work begins
controls.lod_basis: Primary prevention through hazard identification and planning

supporting_text: Management Systems – Inadequate hazard analysis/written job procedures
Workers were not aware of the possible hazards within the piping

controls.name: Isolation of flare scrubber and flare system
controls.barrier_role: Isolate pressurized system before opening flange
controls.lod_basis: Primary engineering control to prevent pressurized gas release

supporting_text: installing a skillet to isolate the flare scrubber and flare

controls.name: Verification of isolation points
controls.barrier_role: Confirm all isolation points are effective before work
controls.lod_basis: Verification of primary isolation control effectiveness

supporting_text: BSEE verified all the isolation points and did not find any unisolated sources

controls.name: Proper equipment installation per hazardous area classification
controls.barrier_role: Ensure all equipment is rated for hazardous area to prevent ignition
controls.lod_basis: Engineering control to prevent ignition sources in hazardous area

supporting_text: all equipment was properly installed per the hazardous area classification drawings
all the tools being used in the equipment which were also rated for the area

controls.name: Onsite medical response and evacuation
controls.barrier_role: Provide immediate medical treatment and evacuation to minimize injury severity

supporting_text: the medic began evaluating both IPs and providing basic first aid
IP #1 was transported to an onshore medical facility for further evaluation
IP #2 was also sent to an onshore medical facility for further evaluation as a precautionary measure

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
